# Simplicity

Prefer simple solutions over complex ones. Every line of code is a liability.

## Requirements

**prefer-simple**: Implementations SHOULD choose the simplest approach that satisfies all requirements.

**avoid-premature-abstraction**: Developers MUST NOT create abstractions until a pattern repeats at least three times.
